overview.description: The Corgi 1-5 Year Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF (CIVG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index of US dollar-denominated investment-grade corporate bonds with remaining maturities between one and five years. The fund provides exposure to higher-quality corporate debt issued by US and non-US companies. CIVG was launched on Jun 4, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
infoTable: FTSE US Broad Investment-Grade Corporate Bond 1-5 Years Index
